feat.name: Fiend-trampling Stature
feat.text: Fiends unfortunate enough to be trampled beneath your feet or rent within your grasp are swiftly granulated into bone kindling and blood powder, and the pain of your strikes prevents them from action. Whenever you critically hit a creature that’s prone, grabbed, or restrained, it can’t use reactions for 1 round.

traits.name: Yaksha
traits.text: Divine spirits who emigrated to Golarion from the first world.
